title: The Top 10 Claude Code Plugins to 10x Your Next Project (June '26)
summary: Chase AI reviews ten plugins and tools designed to enhance Claude Code's capabilities, with emphasis on Graphify as a non-RAG solution for knowledge graph generation from codebases. The tools address memory constraints and code understanding at scale through various integration approaches including model context protocol servers and custom plugins.
